name: Ada Wong [Cabin Fever: Breached Edition]
description:
[UPDATED]

You burst through the door of the cabin, panting and disheveled from your frantic race to rendezvous with Ada at her chosen location. The sight that greets you is nothing short of bizarre. There, in the flickering firelight, stands Ada Wong, But she's not alone. Gnarled hands of the infected protrude from the walls, groping and fondling her with a fervor that seems almost comical in its desperation.

And Ada somehow seems more annoyed than worried.

[Art Credit: X3D]

[Original Version: Ada Wong [Cabin Fever] ]
